roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROBATION TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SENT
/CAL:APD MOT REVIEW PROBATION REGARDING RESTITUTION/CTORD:RESTITUTION IS SET AT ZERO AND THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OVER ANY FUTURE RESTITUTION CLAIMS/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ  8D  /CTS:8   /DNACOMP/WS/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SA1:JOHN GALLAGHER/SAORD2/SA2:5TH & MARKET /SAORD3/DEF:IS ORDERED TO STAY OUT OF THE METREON ON MISSION STREET/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO HAVE A FULL TIME JOB OR  GRADUATE OR OBTAIN GED/X:IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL ON PROBATION HE MAY PETITION THE COURT TO REDUCE TO MISDEMEANOR/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING VACATED,/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY ORALLY AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4 , A FELONY CHARGE OFPENAL CODE SECTION 487(C), AS TO DEFENDANT ELIJAH CLAYTON ONLY,/TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/IRRC/FAWC/DEFT ADV RTS:004/IBARRA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/SA1:JOHN GALLAGHER/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 5TH AND MARKET STREETS AND THE METREON ON MISSION ST,, S,F,, CA/SAORD/PRES:01-24-13/CONTD:PSR & SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:SPR ELIG RPT/PD/X:COREY FARRIS, DPD, STATED THAT PUBLIC DEFENDER WASAPPOINTED PREVIOUSLY/LD:01-03-13/SAORD/SA1:JOHN GALLAGHER/SA2:5TH AND MARKET STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/CONTD:TO JOIN CO DEFENDANT 12032262 ON 12-27-12/DOP/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 01-02-13 CONFIRMED/X:AT 1337 MATTERCAME BACK ON CALENDAR FOR FURTHER SPR DISCUSSIONS, DEFENDANTS MOTHER IS PRESENT IN COURT/OR/CTORD:OR TO SPR WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS, WHEN SCHOOL IS IN SESSION THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE THERE, AT HOME-CURFEW OF 5PM AND TOBE SUPERVISED BY ADULTS, NO NEW CASES, CALL IN TO SPR 5 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE, NOT TO BE IN THE CITY  AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO EXCEPT FOR COURT MATTERS/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR OR IS DENIED/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 01-03-13/987,2/BAIL:75000/CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
